texto: ...there is a constant theme at the centre of all her writings which forms the heart of her vision of God, From her earliest novel to the mature vision of her autobiography, the central importance of unity, reconciliation, one-ness, is reiterated; for she came increasingly to see everything in life, even the darkness of fear and pain and suffering, as part of the one perfect whole that is Creation, that tiny hazelnut of Dame Julian's vision that was all that is made.
explicacao: Citação de Christine Rawlins sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “...there is a constant theme at the centre of all her writings which forms the heart of her visio…” articula motivacao, christian, inspiracional em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: ...there is a constant theme at the centre of all her writings which forms the heart of her vision of God, From her earliest novel to the mature vision of her autobiography, the central importance of unity, reconciliation, one-ness, is reiterated; for she came increasingly to see everything in life, even the darkness of fear and pain and suffering, as part of the one perfect whole that is Creation, that tiny hazelnut of Dame Julian's vision that was all that is made.
